FOURTH CAUSE OF ACTION WRONGFUL TERMINATION/CONSTRUCTIVE DISCHARGE: DENY TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE INTOLERABLE CONDITION. 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION BREACH OF IMPLIED COVENANT - GRANT. 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION: DENY. LAW AND MOTION 302, MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGEMENT, ARGUED, FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION VIOLATION OF CFRA: DENY. SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION VIOLATION OF FEHA - DISCRIMINATION: DENY TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE ADVERSE EMPLOYMENT DECISION. THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION VIOLATION OF FEHA - HOSTILE ENVIRONMENT: GRANT NO TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE FAILURE TO EXHAUST ADMINISTRATIVE REMEDIES. 437C(H) REQUEST DENIED BECAUSE PLAINTIFF DOES NOT SHOW ANY LIKELIHOOD THAT THERE IS EVIDENCE THAT HE HAD ACTUALLY EXHAUSTED ADMINISTRATIVE REMEDIES. FOURTH CAUSE OF ACTION WRONGFUL TERMINATION / CONSTRUCTIVE DISCHARGE: GRANT MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION NO TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE INTOLERABLE CONDITIONS. FIFTH CAUSE OF ACTION BREACH OF IMPLIED COVENANT OF GOOD FAITH AND FAIR DEALING: GRANT CLAIM EITHER BARRED BY GUZ V BECHTEL NATIONAL (2000) 24 CAL.4TH 314, 340 FN 10, OR DUPLICATIVE OF THE WRONGFUL DISCHARGE IN VIOLATION OF PUBLIC POLICY CLAIM. SIXTH CAUSE OF ACITON IIED: DENY. TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE CFRA AND FEHA CLAIMS. SEVENTH CAUSE OF ACTION DEFAMATION: GRANT NO TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. REPORTER:CAROL A.
